message:
🐛 Fix demo badge showing during card loading phase (#1167)

The showDemoIndicator logic had an isDemoData prop bypass that
caused demo badges to appear during the loading phase for cards
in the DEMO_DATA_CARDS set. This removes the bypass so the demo
badge is always suppressed while loading — demo-only cards resolve
instantly so the badge still appears within milliseconds.

Fixes 17 card-loading compliance test failures (criterion A now 100%).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
